description_long: This helmet features a robust, sci-fi inspired design with a predominantly white shell accented by bold orange markings. The front displays a prominent orange stripe running vertically, flanked by a red medical cross emblem on the upper left and black tally marks on the right. The sides are adorned with additional orange panels, with the left side featuring the word 'MYERS' and tally marks, while the right side is marked with 'SIERRA 7' and another red cross. The helmet's surface shows signs of wear, with scuffs and scratches suggesting extensive use. The visor is a full-face, dark-tinted band that wraps around the front, providing wide visibility and protection. The lower section is reinforced and contoured, likely for added impact resistance and comfort.
description: A white and orange sci-fi helmet with a full-face visor, medical cross emblems, tally marks, and visible wear. The helmet features bold graphics and reinforced lower sections.
description_view_0: Front view shows the orange central stripe, red medical cross emblem, black tally marks, and the full-face visor.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the 'MYERS' text, tally marks, and orange side panel with visible scuffing.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the orange vertical stripe and the helmet's contoured back with minimal markings.
description_view_3: Right side view features the 'SIERRA 7' text, red medical cross, and orange side panel with wear marks.
attribute_brand_logo: A red medical cross emblem inside a circle, located on the upper left front and right side of the helmet.
attribute_ventilation_pattern: Two small rectangular vents at the lower front, integrated into the chin guard area.
attribute_graphic_design: White base with orange stripes and panels, red medical cross emblems, black tally marks, and stenciled text ('MYERS', 'SIERRA 7'); style is bold and utilitarian with visible wear.
